repo.description: Lean geopolitical forecasting council: 5-model panel, grounded SITREP, structured predictions per horizon, deterministic Typst report

terms.context_snippet: A lean geopolitical forecasting council. Spin-off of [Hypothesis-Council](https://github.com/danielrosehill/Hypothesis-Council), and a much cheaper cousin of my Snowglobe-style [Geopol-Forecaster](https://github.com/danielrosehill/Geopol-Forecaster) — which simulates ~40 actors …
